label: Pipras Pennyroyal
description: Pipras Pennyroyal is a lean, wiry man with quick, precise movements and an alert posture that suggests he’s always measuring exits and angles. His face is narrow and expressive—high cheekbones, a sharp nose, and a perpetual grin—giving him a perpetually curious, slightly mischievous look.  He has short blonde hair that never quite lies flat, as if it remembers every sprint over rooftops and every wind-chased road.  He carries a small, well-worn personal token he fingers when thinking or lying.  Regularly wearing a blue coat over a yellow vest with a collared shirt underneath.
personality: Pipras is quick-witted, observant, and socially agile, shifting tone and posture to fit the room while quietly keeping control of his own narrative. He prefers clever solutions over force, but won’t hesitate to take calculated risks when cornered or protecting someone he’s claimed as “his responsibility.” Beneath the charm is a wary conscience: he is averse to commitment, hates cruelty, and becomes stubbornly principled when he sees exploitation.  Irrepressibly optimistic; a daring gambler and natural performer with a silver-tongued charm. Flirtatious, promiscuous, impulsive, and averse to commitment. Willing to go with the flow of things, his curiosity for adventure, and lust, demand his attention at the mere suggestion. Never makes promises.
backstoryThemes: debt, obligation, and bargaining for freedom
a past mistake that still sets the terms
truth versus survival (when honesty costs too much)
